{{CargoOrgan
|name=Molten Spike
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10666
|idx=23
|description=Hardened lava crystals—an impenetrable armor and unstoppable weapon. Keep your distance.
|skill=Summon a Holy Sword, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1352
|def=127
|atk=155
|rush=214
|gene1=Fire DMG +60
|gene2=In Fissure combat, Lifesteal Rate +20%
|gene3=Fire RES +60
|gene4=Ignore Fire RES +60
|gene7=Fire DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
